message:
fix(ensemble,robot): remove redundant mutex inside sync.Once, document unused path param

- Remove unnecessary mutex Lock/Unlock inside sync.Once closure in
  defaultSQLiteStore — Once already guarantees happens-before semantics.
  The outer mutex remains to guard against concurrent CloseDefaultStateStore.
- Add comment and nolint:unparam to attentionConflictActions explaining
  that the path parameter is intentionally kept for future per-file diff
  filtering despite being currently unused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
